mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comments ( item_id, user_id, content, rating, create_time, status, type, device_info, user_ip, browser_info, operating_system, location_info, emotional_score, language_code, is_verified_purchase, extra_data ) VALUES ( #{itemId}, #{userId}, #{content}, #{rating}, #{createTime}, #{status}, #{type}, #{deviceInfo}, #{userIp}, #{browserInfo}, #{operatingSystem}, #{locationInfo}, #{emotionalScore}, #{languageCode}, #{isVerifiedPurchase}, #{extraData} )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comments WHERE item_id = #{itemId}
SELECT COUNT(*) as totalComments, AVG(rating) as averageRating FROM comments WHERE item_id = #{itemId}
SELECT rating, COUNT(*) as count FROM comments WHERE item_id = #{itemId} GROUP BY rating

SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN is_verified_purchase = true THEN 1 END) as verifiedCount, AVG(CASE WHEN is_verified_purchase = true THEN rating END) as verifiedAvgRating, AVG(CASE WHEN is_verified_purchase = false THEN rating END) as unverifiedAvgRating FROM comments WHERE item_id = #{itemId}
